sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68595" key="mono/mhlon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονό-μηλον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, name of an <sense id="n68595.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eye-salve</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:103" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.103</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
